name: @spine-benchmark/workbench-core
description: Compatibility aggregator for spine benchmark workbench packages

scripts.prebuild: npm run build --workspace @spine-benchmark/metrics && npm run build --workspace @spine-benchmark/asset-store && npm run build --workspace @spine-benchmark/mesh-tools && npm run build --workspace @spine-benchmark/constraint-tools && npm run build --workspace @spine-benchmark/drawcall-tools && npm run build --workspace @spine-benchmark/render-tools && npm run build --workspace @spine-benchmark/spine-loader && npm run build --workspace @spine-benchmark/file-tools
